arts.ttl: Barcelona sends scouts to watch 20-year-old South Africa talent
arts.sum: Barcelona have made a point of expanding and focusing their scouting network across the African continent over the last couple of years, as evidenced by the arrivals of Ibrahim Diarra and David Oduro from Senegal and Ghana respectively. The latest talent to catch their eye is in South Africa. Orlando Pirates winger Relebohile Mofokeng is […] The post Barcelona sends scouts to watch 20-year-old South Africa talent appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Why are Barcelona and Real Madrid not playing in the second round of the 24/25 Copa del Rey?
arts.sum: Real Madrid and Barça are the league representatives as winners and runners-up from the 23-24 season with Athletic Club and Real Mallorca the Copa del Rey winners and beaten finalists last season. However, attentive Spanish football fans will notice that a handful of high profile teams are absent from the second round games with Real Madrid, FC Barcelona, Athletic Club and Real Mallorca all missing out from the opening stage and this round.

arts.ttl: Barcelona OUT of Williams race as Arsenal or Chelsea on RED ALERT
arts.sum: Barcelona are no longer in the market for Nico Williams, who is now angling for a Premier League move, according to a report. Barcelona OUT of Williams race as Arsenal or Chelsea on RED ALERT

arts.ttl: Report: Barcelona are now looking to rival Arsenal for £120m target next summer
Hansi Flick holds emergency Barcelona meeting and 'singles out' Robert Lewandowski
arts.sum: Hansi Flick's Barcelona suffered a shock defeat at home to Las Palmas on Saturday, a result which has seen their lead at the top of La Liga cut to just one point by Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Barcelona targeting £100m-rated Newcastle ace to replace talisman
arts.sum: Alexander Isak has become one of Eddie Howe’s most important players at Newcastle, but the Swede is set to be the subject of a bid from Barcelona. CaughtOffside sources have advanced that Barcelona are monitoring the situation of the £100m-rated (TeamTalk) Swedish striker, as they consider him to be an excellent alternative to Robert Lewandowski. arts.ttl: Mallorca expecting Barca to ‘be at their best’
arts.sum: Real Mallorca boss Jagoba Arrasate is expecting Barcelona to be at their best when the teams meet on Tuesday. It’s not unusual to have a run of two or three games without a win.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Barcelona set to muscle in on rival’s January bid for £50m-rated Man United ace
arts.sum: News that Real Madrid are apparently preparing a £50m move for Manchester United right-back Diogo Dalot because of not wishing to wait for Trent Alexander-Arnold is surprising indeed. A transfer would therefore need to take place this January and certainly puts the cat amongst the pigeons as far Ruben Amorim’s plans are concerned. arts.ttl: Barcelona Predicted Lineup vs. Mallorca: La Liga
arts.sum: Barcelona hasn't won in its last three league matches as Real Madrid closed the points gap to just one for the top spot.
